# remnawave_passkeys (Data Source)

Lists all WebAuthn passkeys registered for the current admin user. Requires admin JWT auth (username/password), not an API token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_passkeys" "current" {}

output "passkey_count" {
  value = length(data.remnawave_passkeys.current.passkeys)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `passkeys` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--passkeys))

<a id="nestedatt--passkeys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `passkeys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `name` (String) Human-readable passkey name.
- `uuid` (String) Passkey UUID.
